scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm dlx wrangler@4.86.0 pages deploy frontend --project-name gov-budget --branch main
scripts.check:frontend: node --check frontend/assets/js/app.js && node --check frontend/assets/js/map.js && node --check frontend/assets/js/sensory.js && node --check tools/generate-nevada-demo.mjs && node --check tools/generate-sitemap.mjs && node --check tools/ingest/nevada-state-checkbook.mjs && node --check tools/ingest/nevada-las-vegas.mjs && node --check tools/ingest/nevada-ccsd.mjs && node --check tools/ingest/nevada-counties.mjs && node --check tools/ingest/nevada-districts.mjs
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check --all && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
scripts.validate:manifest: before=$(shasum -a 256 frontend/data/manifest.json 2>/dev/null || true); pnpm manifest; after=$(shasum -a 256 frontend/data/manifest.json 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$before" != "$after" ]; then echo 'frontend/data/manifest.json is stale; run pnpm manifest' >&2; exit 1; fi; cargo run -q -p spending-validate -- frontend/data/bootstrap.json frontend/data/manifest.json
scripts.check: pnpm check:frontend && pnpm sitemap && pnpm check:rust && pnpm validate:data && pnpm validate:manifest && pnpm check:audit
